## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::MegaphoneOff;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        MegaphoneOff { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
advertisement, announcement, attention, alert, loudspeaker, megaphone, notification, disable, silent

## Categories
multimedia, notifications

[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/megaphone-off)
